title: rubus vestitus subsp. leucanthemus
intro: Rubus vestitus subsp. leucanthemus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family. It is known for its edible fruit and medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus vestitus subsp. leucanthemus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine in the Himalayan region.
